title: CompactHUD
description: This mod makes the default HUD more compact.
body:
This mod makes the in-game HUD more compact. Since this is my first Fabric mod, bugs are to be expected :)
![Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/301892c86b4178f0ae123c9c4bb42af4ca33f810.png)
![Crosshair + Attack Cooldown Indicator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42266b22e9d4274169a51e1888268cc13c9b4fdb_0.webp)
